projectDescription: Redesigning the eval report HTML to surface executive context, clear status, and an interactive evidence viewer per Zack's Jul 2 feedback.
existingSystem: Red Hat Display/Text/Mono + PF v6 tokens + Notion-inspired light theme (config/report-style.yaml)

decisions.title: Executive Summary Layout
decisions.summary: How the Jira summary, MR changes, and pipeline utilization are structured at the top of the report

decisions.title: Status Grid Design
decisions.reasoning: Combines D's visual hierarchy (dominant pass rate metric) with B's contextual detail (per-AC checklist with names and failure descriptions)
decisions.summary: The 4-question card layout that immediately answers: built, working, attention, next action

decisions.title: Evidence Viewer Layout
decisions.summary: The modal's overall structure — panel arrangement, content distribution, and viewport behavior

decisions.title: Evidence Tree Navigation
decisions.summary: How the persona → step tree expands, highlights, and indicates evidence presence

decisions.title: AC Filter Interaction
decisions.summary: How selecting an acceptance criterion propagates highlights through the evidence tree and step detail

decisions.title: Review Entry & Interface
decisions.summary: How the designer enters the review flow and what the review interface looks like

decisions.title: Review Actions & Output
decisions.summary: What actions are available after review — CSV update, re-iteration trigger, resolution marking

decisions.title: Appendix Navigation Pattern
decisions.summary: How the 5 appendix sections are navigated — tabs, accordion, scrollable sections, or sidebar nav

decisions.title: Appendix Content Layout
decisions.reasoning: Combines A's scannable score bars for quick visual parsing with D's narrative insights and colored left-border callout cards for key issues and strengths
decisions.summary: How individual items within appendix sections are displayed — density, cards, scores visualization

decisions.title: Appendix Tab Content Redesign
decisions.reasoning: Rename tabs (Fix History, Design Compliance, Pipeline), deduplicate consistency violations, add visual dot timeline. Note: each tab's content is unique — same pattern should NOT be applied blindly to all tabs.
decisions.summary: How to restructure What Changed, Iterations, and Consistency tabs — renaming, deduplication, and timeline visualization

decisions.title: eval-journey Playwright Strategy
decisions.chosenTitle: Keep Playwright as visual truth source
decisions.reasoning: Ghost elements are real (RHAISTRAT-432), screenshots feed report trust, 40-49s is acceptable (15-25% of total), fix loop needs visual confirmation. Revisit if pipeline exceeds 10 min consistently.
decisions.summary: Whether to keep, drop, or reduce Playwright in Phase A eval-journey — keep current behavior for correctness
